mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrow_records ORDER BY record_id DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY record_id DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY record_id DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE status = '0' ORDER BY record_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_records (student_id, book_id, borrow_date, return_date, actual_return_date, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowDate}, #{returnDate}, #{actualReturnDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
